mapper.insert: INSERT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0208-03_2#Sql001 */ INTO T_JP_ORDER ( IFA_ORDER_NO, IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO, BUTEN_CODE, ACCOUNT_NUMBER, CUSTOMER_ID, SPECIFIC_KBN, BRAND_CD, MARKET, ORDER_STATUS, TRADE_KBN, QUANTITY, LIMIT, AZUKARI_KBN, PAYMENT_LIMIT, REPAYMENT_METHOD_TYPE, REQUEST_TYPE, ORDER_SYUBETSU, ORDER_SYUBETSU_LIST, KANYU_KBN, JUTYU_KBN, CHECK_INSIDER, CHECK_SOR, CHECK_COMP_WRN_ALERT, SHIKIN_SEIKAKU_KBN, USER_ID, CANCEL_USER_ID, TESUURYOU_KBN, ALTER_FLG, AUTO_ORDER_KIND, RBE_ORDER_KIND, SASINARI_KBN, PRICE, TRIGGER_ZONE, TRIGGER_PRICE, OCO_SASINARI_KBN, OCO_SASHINE, DONE_SASINARI_KBN, DONE_SASHINE, DONE_RBE_ORDER_KIND, DONE_TRIGGER_ZONE, DONE_TRIGGER_NEDAN, DONE_OCO_SASINARI_KBN, DONE_OCO_SASHINE, DONE_LIMIT, JO_ZEI_KBN, ALTER_ORDER_NUM, RBE_ORDER_STATUS, ORDER_TYPE, ORDER_NUM, ACCEPT_DATE, ACCEPT_TIME, SHUBETU, CODE, MESSAGE, ESTIMATE_PRICE, AMOUNT, COMMISSION, CONSUMPTION_TAX, CAPITAL_GAIN_TAX, NET_AMOUNT, COST, TRADE_DATE, SETTLEMENT_DATE, ACCEPT_LIMIT, DONE_ACCEPT_LIMIT, COM_ID_R, AC_POSITION, AC_POSITION_AFTER, AC_BALANCE, AC_BALANCE_AFTER, ORDERED_MARKET, TRADE_DEFICIT_AMOUNT, ISA_BUY_LIMIT, JRNISA_TRANSFER_AMOUNT, SOR_LINK_KBN, UNCLOSED_QUANTITY, UNCLOSED_QUANTITY_AFTER, MARGIN_CAPABILITY, MARGIN_CAPABILITY_AFTER, ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE, ACTUAL_GRNT_RATE_AFTER, APP_INTEREST_RATES, APP_LENDING_STOCK, PREMIUM, TPOINT, TPOINT_AFTER, DAILY_CREDIT_KBN, PAYMENT_LIMIT_DATE, DATE_KBN, BROKER_CODE, INTERMEDIARY_EMP_CD, CREATE_TIME, CREATE_USER, UPDATE_TIME, UPDATE_USER, CCS_SEND_DATE ) VALUES ( #{req.ifaOrderNo} ,#{req.ifaOrderSubNo} ,#{req.butenCode} ,#{req.accountNumber} ,#{req.customerId} ,#{req.specificKbn} ,#{req.brandCd} ,#{req.market} ,#{req.orderStatus} ,#{req.tradeKbn} ,#{req.quantity} ,#{req.limit} ,#{req.azukariKbn} ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.orderSyubetsu} ,#{req.orderSyubetsuList} ,#{req.kanyuKbn} ,#{req.jutyuKbn} ,#{req.checkInsider} ,#{req.checkSor} ,#{req.checkCompWrnAlert} ,#{req.shikinSeikakuKbn} ,#{req.userId} ,null ,#{req.tesuuryouKbn} ,#{req.alterFlg} ,#{req.autoOrderKind} ,#{req.rbeOrderKind} ,#{req.sasinariKbn} ,#{req.price} ,#{req.triggerZone} ,#{req.triggerPrice} ,#{req.ocoSasinariKbn} ,#{req.ocoSashine} ,#{req.doneSasinariKbn} ,#{req.doneSashine} ,#{req.doneRbeOrderKind} ,#{req.doneTriggerZone} ,#{req.doneTriggerNedan} ,#{req.doneOcoSasinariKbn} ,#{req.doneOcoSashine} ,#{req.doneLimit} ,#{req.joZeiKbn} ,#{req.alterOrderNum} ,#{req.rbeOrderStatus} ,#{req.orderType} ,#{req.orderNum} ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,null ,#{req.brokerCode} ,#{req.intermediaryEmpCd} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.createUser} ,IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,#{req.updateUser} ,null )
mapper.update: UPDATE /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0208-03_2#Sql002 */ T_JP_ORDER SET UPDATE_TIME = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE ,UPDATE_USER = #{req.updateUser} ,ACCEPT_DATE = IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_SDATE('YYYYMMDD') WHERE IFA_ORDER_NO = #{req.ifaOrderNo} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = #{req.ifaOrderSubNo}
mapper.select: WITH temp AS ( SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0208-03_2#Sql003 */ TO_CHAR(IFA_ORDER_NO) IFA_ORDER_NO , TO_CHAR(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , TO_CHAR(BUTEN_CODE) BUTEN_CODE , TO_CHAR(ACCOUNT_NUMBER) ACCOUNT_NUMBER , TO_CHAR(CUSTOMER_ID) CUSTOMER_ID , TO_CHAR(SPECIFIC_KBN) SPECIFIC_KBN , TO_CHAR(JO_ZEI_KBN) JO_ZEI_KBN , TO_CHAR(CHECK_SOR) CHECK_SOR , TO_CHAR(ORDER_NUM) ORDER_NUM FROM T_JP_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NUM = #{req.orderNum} AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCEPT_DATE >= #{req.acceptDate} AND IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO = ( SELECT MAX(IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO) FROM T_JP_ORDER WHERE ORDER_NUM = #{req.orderNum} AND BUTEN_CODE = #{req.butenCode} AND ACCEPT_DATE >= #{req.acceptDate} ) ) SELECT NVL(IFA_ORDER_NO, TO_CHAR(IFA_DATE_UTIL.IFA_GET_DATE, 'YYYYMMDD') || LPAD(SEQ_T_JP_ORDER.NEXTVAL, 10, '0')) IFA_ORDER_NO , IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO + 1 IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , BUTEN_CODE , ACCOUNT_NUMBER , CUSTOMER_ID CUSTOMER_ID , SPECIFIC_KBN SPECIFIC_KBN , JO_ZEI_KBN , CHECK_SOR , ORDER_NUM ORDER_NUM FROM ( SELECT * FROM temp UNION ALL SELECT NULL IFA_ORDER_NO , '0' IFA_ORDER_SUB_NO , #{req.butenCode} BUTEN_CODE , #{req.accountNumber} ACCOUNT_NUMBER , #{req.customerId} CUSTOMER_ID , #{req.specificKbn} SPECIFIC_KBN , NULL JO_ZEI_KBN , #{req.checkSor} CHECK_SOR , #{req.orderNum} ORDER_NUM FROM dual WHERE (SELECT count(*) FROM temp) = 0 )
